item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.
notes: Both agents reject a strict society-over-individual-rights position throughout and instead argue for protecting individual rights within social or collective policy. Agent A consistently frames rights and collective welfare as needing balance. Agent B remains critical of Indonesian policies that prioritize social stability at the expense of personal freedom. No clear flip is visible. Agent B turn 6 contains a language artifact: "Saya still tidak setuju".
